verdict: PASS — all checks clear. The single cycle-3 failure in §5.8 is resolved: (A) the three deferred concepts (task description, format and constraints, success criteria) are no longer bolded in the pairing list — only the three in-scope concepts (inputs, expected outputs, failure conditions) carry bold; (B) the closing sentence that previously assigned functional roles ('make it actionable', 'make it bounded', 'make it testable') has been replaced with the neutral 'A specification with all six components satisfies the four-property checklist introduced in topic 2.1 [1][2][3].' — no defining clause for any deferred concept. §§5.2, 5.5, 5.7 remain bare-name + pointer form; §5.9 worked example remains scoped to the three core components only. Required sections present and non-trivial; all three primary resources cited with adequate density across §§4–10; no fabricated citations; no hard forward references; word count within standard-profile range (3,000–4,400); beginner readability clean throughout.

required_sections.detail: §3 Learning Objectives: 6 bullet points, ~90 words (≥50 required). §4 Introduction: 4 paragraphs, ~150 words (≥50 required). §5 Core Concepts: 9 subsections spanning several hundred words total (≥100 required). §10 Key Takeaways: 5 bullets, ~85 words (≥50 required). All four required sections present and non-trivial.

citation_density.detail: All three primary resources cited at least once. [1] Medium/SDD (https://medium.com/@wanimohit1/...): cited in §§4, 5.1, 5.3, 5.8, 5.9, 6, 7, 8, 10. [2] LaunchDarkly (https://launchdarkly.com/blog/...): cited in §§4, 5.3, 5.4, 5.6, 5.8, 5.9, 6, 10. [3] Galileo (https://galileo.ai/blog/...): cited in §§5.4, 5.6, 5.9, 7, 8, 10. Citation density in §§5, 6, 7 adequate — factual assertions carry inline markers throughout. No fabricated citations detected; all three [N] markers resolve to entries in topic.resources.json.

soft_observations: 'AI agents' — used once in §7 as a bare noun phrase ('AI agents can fail silently when specifications are incomplete') without definition, bolding, or defining clause. Carried from cycle-2 soft observation. Not escalated to hard fail — genuinely incidental, below the threshold of teaching a concept.
sequence_drift.detail: No technical terms reference topics sequenced after 2.3 in a manner that constitutes forward-teaching. 'Hallucination' is defined inline on first use in §5.6 with a parenthetical plain-language meaning before the technical phrasing. All other terms draw on Week 1 vocabulary or 2.1/2.2 concepts as permitted.

length_sanity.detail: Estimated word count falls within the standard-profile range of 3,000–4,400. Stub sections §§5.2, 5.5, 5.7 (each two lines) and the compact §5.8 keep overall length within range. Corpus remains well within the 30% outside-range buffer. No length fail triggered.

resolved_since_cycle_3: scope_creep FIXED: §5.8 — (A) 'Task description', 'Format and constraints', and 'Success criteria' are no longer bolded in the pairing list; only the three in-scope concepts carry bold as expected. (B) The closing sentence 'the task description and inputs make it actionable; the format and constraints make it bounded; … the success criteria make it testable' has been removed and replaced with 'A specification with all six components satisfies the four-property checklist introduced in topic 2.1 [1][2][3].' — no functional/defining clause for any deferred concept. Fully compliant with scope_discipline bare-name rule.
topic_scope.detail: All deferred concepts (task description, format and constraints, success criteria) appear only as bare names in §§5.2, 5.5, 5.7, 5.8 with appropriate companion-topic pointers or neutral pairing language. No concept taught outside the topic headline. No scope_creep findings remain across cycles 1–4.

beginner_readability.detail: All non-everyday terms defined on first use. 'Hallucination' defined inline at §5.6 with parenthetical plain-language meaning before technical phrasing. No unexplained acronyms. Tables used for concept lists and anti-patterns — no single paragraph introduces 3+ new terms simultaneously. Sentence register is plain and direct throughout; active voice; learner addressed as 'you'. No hedging phrases detected. Zero distinct soft findings — no escalation to hard fail.

recommended_action: No further revisions required. Corpus is ready to advance to corpus_human_approved and artifact fan-out.
